---
title: Free radical modelling studies during the UK TORCH Campaign in Summer 2003
date: '2007-01-01'
author:
- K.M. Emmerson
- N. Carslaw
- D.C. Carslaw
- J.D. Lee
- G. McFiggans
- W.J. Bloss
- T. Gravestock
- D.E. Heard
- J. Hopkins
- T. Ingham
- M.J. Pilling
- S.C. Smith
- M. Jacob
- P.S. Monks
categories:
- Journal Article
publication: '*Atmospheric Chemistry and Physics*'
---

## Free radical modelling studies during the UK TORCH Campaign in Summer 2003

<p class="pub-meta">K.M. Emmerson, N. Carslaw, D.C. Carslaw, J.D. Lee, G. McFiggans, W.J. Bloss, T. Gravestock, D.E. Heard, J. Hopkins, T. Ingham, M.J. Pilling, S.C. Smith, M. Jacob, P.S. Monks</p>

_*Atmospheric Chemistry and Physics*_, 2007


<div class="pub-links">
<a href="carslaw-2007-b.bib" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm"><i class="bi bi-download"></i> BibTeX</a>
</div>
